zh.Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail於大約1513年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾時，他的父親John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail31歲，母親Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail28歲。他於1530年與Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1568年6月6日在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾享年56歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail于大约1513年出生在苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾时，他的父亲John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail31岁，母亲Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail28岁。他于1530年与Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail在英国苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1568年6月6日在苏格兰音巴內-爾享年56岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾爾金爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mackenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: Kenneth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Scottish origin: Anglicized form of two different Gaelic names, Cinaed and Cainnech. The former was the Gaelic name of Kenneth mac Alpin ( d. 858 ), first king of the united Picts and Scots. The latter survives today in Scotland as the common Gaelic name Coinneach . Since early in the 20th century Kenneth has been in regular use and enjoyed great popularity as a given name well beyond the borders of Scotland.

variants.name: Kennith
meanings: Of Scottish origin: Anglicized form of two different Gaelic names, Cinaed and Cainnech. The former was the Gaelic name of Kenneth mac Alpin ( d. 858 ), first king of the united Picts and Scots. The latter survives today in Scotland as the common Gaelic name Coinneach . Since early in the 20th century Kenneth has been in regular use and enjoyed great popularity as a given name well beyond the borders of Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Coinneach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname meaning ‘handsome, comely’. See also Kenneth .

nameMeanings.name: na
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Nathan   and   Nathaniel .

en.lifeSummary: When Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail was born about 1513, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail, was 28. He married Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail in 1530, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 6 June 1568, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 56, and was buried in Elginshire, Scotland.

fr.Cromarty, Ross & Cromarty, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail est né environ 1513, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail en 1530, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 6 juin 1568, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Elginshire, Écosse.

de.Cromarty, Ross & Cromarty, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail um 1513 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail 28. Er hat 1530 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Juni 1568 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Inverness-shire, Scotland und wurde in Elginshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail è nato il circa 1513 nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail nel 1530, nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 6 giugno 1568, nel Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Elginshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintailが約1513年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルで生まれた時，父John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintailは31歳，母Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintailは28歳であった。1530年にイギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルでElizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintailと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1568年6月6日にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで56歳で死去し，スコットランドエルジンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Cromarty, Ross & Cromarty, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티
ko.lifeSummary: Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail(이)가 대략 1513년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1530년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1568년 6월 6일 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail nasceu aproximadamente 1513, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail em 1530, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de junho de 1568, em Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Elginshire, Scotland.

ru.Cromarty, Ross & Cromarty, Scotland: кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail родился около 1513 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail в 1530 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 6 июня 1568 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности элгиншир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail en 1530, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 6 de junio de 1568, en Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Elginshire, Scotland.
